description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pull Request Checks that runs on every pull request to the master and feature branches. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up multiple .NET versions (3.1, 5, 6.0, 7.0, 8.0) and Node.js 16.x, then performs a build with dotnet build and npm install, runs tests with dotnet test and npm test, and uploads the test coverage to Codecov.
